#[cfg_attr(any(test, feature = "test-utils"), crate::add_arbitrary_tests(crate, compact))]
#[cfg_attr(feature = "test-utils", allow(unreachable_pub), visibility::make(pub))]
pub(crate) struct TxPasskey {
    chain_id: ChainId,
    nonce: u64,
    gas_limit: u64,
    max_fee_per_gas: u128,
    max_priority_fee_per_gas: u128,
    to: TxKind,
    value: U256,
    access_list: AccessList,
    commitment_tx: Option<B256>,
    settlement_tx: Option<B256>,
    spc_calls: Option<Vec<SpcCall>>,
    input: Bytes,  // Must be last for Compact derive
}

impl Compact for AlloyTxPasskey {
    fn to_compact<B>(&self, buf: &mut B) -> usize
    where
        B: bytes::BufMut + AsMut<[u8]>,
atoms.semantic_claim: Passkey compact storage preserves chain id, nonce, gas, fees, kind, value, access list, settlement transaction, optional SPC calls, and trailing input for P-256 and WebAuthn transactions.
